title: malache paniculata
intro: Malache paniculata, also known as Clary Sage, is a flowering plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used for centuries in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Malache paniculata include relieving stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of PMS and menopause, as well as reducing inflammation and pain. Herbal preparations of Clary Sage include essential oil, tea, and tincture, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
